function.message: I couldn’t safely complete this inbox item because the request is ambiguous from canonical records. Black Library Evenings has a project creation date of 2026-04-03, but I found no canonical project record for a “sailboat refit notebook” and no start date for it; it appears only as an unscheduled idea in a knowledge note. I did not delete any project or the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read required workflow docs for inbox processing, verified canonical project lane before destructive action, and stopped without mutation on ambiguity per inbox/workflow rules.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asks for a date comparison and deletion. Canonical project evidence confirms Black Library Evenings in 40_projects/2026_04_03_black_library_evenings/README.MD, but no sailboat project exists in 40_projects (search returned zero), and 30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md frames sailboat refit notebook as a fantasy note with no start date. Completing deletion would require guessing, so clarification is required.
